title: Graduate Engineer-Mechanical System
description:
We believe real value is powered by the unique skills and experiences of our professionals. The interchange of ideas from a diverse group of people gives our teams an expanded perspective and the ability to find better solutions for our clients.

Req Id : 114028

Job Title : Graduate Engineer-Mechanical System

Business Unit sector : CPL-BVOPS-ENGR & DEV SVCS

Department: BVCPL BV OPS EDS MECHANICAL

Work Location : INPUNE

Opportunity Type : Staff

Relocation eligible : Yes

Full time/Part time : Full-Time

Contract Hire Only for this Project: No

Visa Sponsorship Available: No

Recruiter : Ashwini Dnyanoba Patil

Job Summary

Under close supervision, performs routine aspects of engineering assignments requiring knowledge and application of basic engineering principles. Applies knowledge of engineering principles to prescribed techniques and procedures to complete project assignments.

Key Responsibilities
Engineering Standards:


Develops familiarity by reading, understanding and applying departmental design guides, standards, systems, applicable engineering codes and Black and Veatch policies and procedures


Quality / Continuous Improvement:


Develops an understanding and complies with the Black and Veatch quality program
Supports continuous improvement and change management efforts


Engineering Production:


Contributes to preparation of less complex engineering deliverables such as drawings, reports, specifications, and studies of limited scope
Performs routine research and develops recommendations for equipment and/or materials selection
Collects, assimilates, and manages data for engineering work
Prepares basic engineering calculations following standard methods and principles used in similar engineering analysis
Understands and adheres to budget, schedule, and quality requirements


Project Coordination:


Shares information with others as requested
Coordinates with others when directed by supervisor or project leadership


Client Focus:


Focuses on the needs of internal clients (project team leadership) while attempting to gain basic understanding of external client's main interests and drivers
May provide support to business development or pursuit activities


Knowledge Sharing, Innovation and Technology:


Shares current knowledge of latest technology and processes


Management Responsibilities
Individual Contributor

Preferred Qualifications

Preferred Non-Technical Skills:


Learning on the Fly . Problem Solving
Intellectual Horsepower
Written Communications
Drive For Results
Informing
Listening
Dealing with Ambiguity


Preferred Technical Skills:


Basic knowledge of engineering design principles and applicable design guides and standards related to assigned engineering discipline
Basic industry knowledge and technology trends
Basic knowledge of company quality program
Basic knowledge of construction and constructability practices and principles


Minimum Qualifications

Requires a bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering from either a recognized accredited program in their home country or the country in which the professional is practicing. All applicants must be able to complete pre-employment onboarding requirements (if selected) which may include any/all of the following: criminal/civil background check, drug screen, and motor vehicle records search, in compliance with any applicable laws and regulations.

Certifications

Work Environment/Physical Demands

Competencies

Salary Plan
ENG: Engineering

Job Grade
014

BVH, Inc., its subsidiaries and its affiliated companies, complies with all Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) affirmative action laws and regulations. Black & Veatch does not discriminate on the basis of age, race, religion, color, sex, national origin, marital status, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender Identity and expression, disability, veteran status, pregnancy status or other status protected by law.

Black & Veatch is committed to being an employer of choice by creating a valuable work experience that keeps our people engaged, productive, safe and healthy. We offer professionals an array of health and welfare benefits that vary based on their geographic region and employment status. This may include health, life accident and disability insurances, paid time off, financial programs and more. Professionals may also be eligible for a performance-based bonus program.

By valuing diverse voices and perspectives, we cultivate an authentically inclusive environment for professionals and are able to provide innovative and effective solutions for clients.

title: Rehlko Off Campus Drive 2026: Exciting GET Role In Pune
description:
Rehlko Off Campus Drive 2026 offers an excellent opportunity for fresh engineering graduates to kickstart their careers as Graduate Engineer Trainees in Pune. This hiring drive is ideal for candidates looking to gain hands-on industry experience, develop technical expertise, and work with a reputed organization. With an attractive expected salary package and strong career growth prospects, Rehlko provides a dynamic environment for freshers to build a successful engineering career.

About Rehlko

Rehlko is a global leader in energy resilience, delivering the solutions critical to sustain and improve life. Formerly, for more than 100 years as Kohler Energy, our teams have excelled, reliably meeting today’s energy needs while planning for tomorrow’s. Now, with a new name and increased focus, we are giving our customers more control over where energy is sourced and where it goes, from industrial applications to your own backyard. Our solutions give people the resilience they need to keep building a brighter future, together.

Candidates Also Search: NOV Off Campus Drive 2026: Exciting QA Analyst Opportunity in Kochi

Rehlko Off Campus Drive 2026 Details

Company Name Rehlko Job Role Graduate Engineering Trainee – Mechanical Job Type Full Time Job Location Pune Education BE/ B.Tech Career Level 0 – 1 Years Salary Not Mentioned Company Website www.rehlko.com

Job Description For Rehlko Off Campus Drive 2026

We are looking for a passionate and detail-oriented “Mechanical Design Engineer – Trainee” to join our engineering team. The individual will be a part of the engines team and shall be able to work and grow in tandem with team objectives. The candidate will assist in designing Engine components and systems, preparing CAD models and Supporting Engineering activities like SAP BOM Creation, Maintaining product data in SAP, Product development activities under the guidance of senior engineers/Manager.

Responsibilities


Assist in creating 3D models and 2D drawings using CAD software (e.g., Unigraphics, Creo).
Support design activities for new product development and engineering changes.
Create BOM & Maintain Material Master in SAP.
Perform basic tolerance analysis, material selection, and design calculations.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (manufacturing, quality, procurement) to ensure design feasibility.
Maintain design documentation and adhere to company standards.
Participate in design reviews and implement feedback from senior engineers.
Learn and apply basic GD&T principles and industry best practices.
Maintains project records, prepare technical, cost and other reports as requested to show progress and results achieved.
Works to support the department goals.
Demonstrates and acts on innovative traits: curiosity, continuous questioning, open minded, investigative.


Qualification


University degree in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent qualification
Preferred Qualification: Internship or academic project experience in mechanical design


Technical Skills


Preferred proficiency in CAD tools (Unigraphics, Creo)
Good to have exposure to SAP
Good to have exposure in PLM software (Windchill, Team center)
Basic understanding of mechanical design principles, materials, and manufacturing processes.
Familiarity with GD&T and engineering drawings.
Basic knowledge of engine technology and components
Knowledge of Microsoft suite of products and ability to learn new software programs quickly.
Good to have knowledge of Power BI, C / C++ language


Rehlko Off Campus Drive 2026 Selection Process

Skills

The selection process for the Rehlko Off Campus Drive 2026 is designed to evaluate candidates across technical knowledge, problem-solving ability, and communication skills. Typically, the hiring process consists of the following stages:


Online Application


Candidates must first apply through the official careers portal or through job platforms. Ensure your resume highlights relevant skills, academic performance, and any internship or project experience.


Online Assessment Test


Shortlisted candidates are invited to take an online test, which generally includes:


Aptitude (Quantitative, Logical Reasoning)
Technical Questions (Core subjects related to your branch)
Coding / Programming (for technical roles)


This round is crucial as it acts as the primary filter.


Technical Interview


Candidates who clear the assessment are invited for one or more technical interview rounds. This stage evaluates:


Core subject knowledge (e.g., Data Structures, OOPs, DBMS, etc.)
Coding and problem-solving skills
Understanding of projects and internships
Practical application of concepts


Be prepared to explain your resume in depth.


HR Interview


The HR Round Focuses On


Communication skills
Behavioral questions
Cultural fit within the organization
Career goals and expectations


Basic questions about relocation, flexibility, and teamwork may also be asked.


Final Selection & Offer


Candidates who successfully clear all rounds will receive an offer letter via email. The offer includes details about salary, role, and onboarding process.

FAQs

What is the eligibility criteria for Rehlko Off Campus Drive 2026?

Candidates typically need a BE/B.Tech or relevant degree with a minimum percentage (usually 60% or above) and no active backlogs. Specific eligibility may vary depending on the role.

Is coding mandatory for the selection process?

Yes, for technical roles like Graduate Engineer Trainee, coding skills are usually required, especially in the online test and technical interview rounds.

What kind of questions are asked in the technical interview?

Questions are mainly based on core subjects such as Data Structures, Algorithms, Operating Systems, DBMS, and concepts related to your academic projects.

How can I prepare for the Rehlko placement test?

Focus on aptitude practice, revise core technical subjects, and practice coding problems on platforms like LeetCode, HackerRank, or CodeChef.

Does Rehlko hire freshers through off-campus drives?

Yes, Rehlko actively hires fresh graduates through off-campus drives for roles like Graduate Engineer Trainee and entry-level engineering positions.

Rehlko Off Campus Drive 2026 Application Link

DOUBLE CLICK TO APPLY ONLINE !

We wish you the best of luck in your Rehlko Off Campus Drives 2026. May your talents shine, and may you find the perfect opportunity that not only meets your professional goals but also brings joy to your everyday work.

title: SEO Intern
description:
At DViO Digital, we don’t just run campaigns—we solve real business problems at scale. If you’re someone who’s curious about how Google really works, loves decoding trends, and wants to build skills that actually matter in digital marketing, this role is for you.




What you’ll get to do

Work closely with the SEO team on live client projects across industries
Assist in keyword research, competitor analysis & search intent mapping
Support in on-page optimization (meta tags, content structuring, internal linking)
Help track performance using tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, etc.
Contribute to SEO audits and actionable recommendations
Stay on top of Google algorithm updates & SEO trends
Collaborate with content and tech teams to understand how SEO fits into the larger marketing ecosystem




What we’re looking for

MBA / Graduate with a strong interest in digital marketing & SEO
Basic understanding of how search engines work (even from courses/self-learning is fine)
Strong analytical mindset + comfort with data
Good communication skills (you should be able to explain your thought process)
Curious, proactive, and not afraid to ask questions
Someone who actually wants to learn, not just complete an internship




Bonus points if you

Have done any certifications (Google, HubSpot, etc.)
Have a blog, side project, or have experimented with SEO/content
Know basic Excel / Google Sheets




Why join us

Work on real brands, real budgets, real impact
Learn directly from a high-performing performance marketing team
Fast-paced agency environment that will accelerate your learning curve
Opportunity to convert into a full-time role based on performance

title: Business Development Intern
description:
Company Description


UrbanRoof Pvt. Ltd. is a leading service provider specializing in waterproofing, repair, and rehabilitation for buildings and constructions. Operating in Pune, Mumbai, Bangalore, and Delhi, we focus on delivering effective solutions to safeguard and restore properties. With a diverse portfolio of services, we are committed to providing excellence in building and construction repairs. Learn more about us at http://urbanroof.in/.


Role Description


This is a full-time on-site role based in Pune City for a Business Development Intern. The intern will engage in lead generation, identify potential clients, conduct in-depth market research, and connect with prospective customers. Responsibilities include fostering client relationships, assisting with customer service, and contributing to the growth strategies of the business.


Qualifications

Strong analytical skills to evaluate data and drive informed decisions
Effective communication and interpersonal skills for client interactions
Experienced in lead generation and market research
Customer service orientation with the ability to address client needs
Ability to work collaboratively within a team and independently
Proven problem-solving and organizational skills
Interest or background in the field of construction or property rehabilitation is an advantage
Currently pursuing or having completed a degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field

title: Investment Banking Intern
description:
M&A Research Analyst Intern, Technology Investment Banking




Location: Pune




About this Job:




We are looking for an Investment Banking Intern to support our Technology Investment Banking team across deal origination, sector research, and transaction execution. The role offers hands-on exposure to live mandates while also involving active participation in lead generation, market mapping, and outreach to potential counterparties and investors.




The firm believes in providing appropriate opportunities for building meaningful experience within the cross-border Investment Banking industry, getting exposure to the ecosystem and key external participants in the Investment Banking ecosystem, and building valuable industry connections and professional networks over the longer term. 




Key Responsibilities:




1. Conduct market research, company profiling, and competitive benchmarking to identify emerging investment themes and potential targets.

2. Researching Technology companies across different domains including IT Services, AI, Cloud, IoT, etc. based on various investment parameters such as Revenue, No of employees, industry and other key parameters.

3. Working closely with senior team members on execution of live M&A mandates, including developing an in-depth understanding of target companies (business model, key differentiators, industry positioning, stakeholder alignment, etc.), preparation of transaction collaterals, building financial models, and application of valuation methodologies such as DCF, trading comparables, and transaction comparables.

4. Developing deep understanding of global technology M&A landscape through sector-focused transaction analysis, including evaluation of valuation benchmarks, deal structures, and assessment of strategic rationale and synergies.

5. Building and maintaining key information repository and contact databases with high accuracy.

6. Assisting senior Transaction team with support required on a daily basis with respect to building information lists above in a timely and accurate manner (for eg: you may quickly gather research and information on Top 30-50 AI companies on one day and next day work on different Technology industry segment based on business priorities, etc.).

7. Contribute to business development initiatives through lead generation, outreach to prospective clients and investors, and maintenance of deal trackers and CRM databases.

8. Prepare sector briefs, landscape maps, and insights on emerging sub-sectors such as digital engineering, cloud, data analytics, and healthcare technology.




What We are Looking For:

• Educational Qualification: CA Finalists (both groups of CA Intermediate cleared) or CFA Level I cleared candidates.

• Prior articleship/internship experience in relevant roles (e.g., M&A advisory, FP&A, equity research, transaction support, or investor relations) demonstrating the ability to apply financial analysis and valuation methodologies will be an advantage.

• A self-starter with a strong curiosity for the technology ecosystem and emerging business models.

• Diligent about tracking innovative companies, market trends, and investment activity across tech sub-sectors.

• Strong research capabilities with the ability to manage, structure, and curate large databases, lists, and information sets in Excel or CRM tools.

• Ability to connect insights from the startup and venture world to strategic M&A and investment opportunities in the technology sector.




About the Firm:

SA Global Advisors (SA) is a leading global investment banking firm focused exclusively on growth investments and M&A for the Digital and Technology sectors. Our partners and senior executives are deeply rooted entrepreneurs with more than two decades of experience as founders, operating executives, and investors. We bring a unique perspective shaped by our own successful journeys in scaling, acquiring, growing, and exiting technology companies backed by marquee global investors.




We specialize in high-growth segments across Digital Transformation, Data and AI led Consulting Services, Engineering R&D (ER&D) and Data & Cloud Engineering, with focus on sub-sectors such as Embedded Systems, PLM, MBSE, Digital Manufacturing, Cloud Modernization, Gen-AI & Data Analytics, DevOps & Managed Services.

description:

description:

description:

Welltogether hosts YouTube podcast.

As a Video Editing Intern, you will work in editing video content for various projects, including assembling raw footage, adding motion graphics, and refining the overall visual and audio quality. title: Digital Growth & B2B Strategy Intern at JerkTrend
description:
Location: Pune, Maharashtra (Hybrid/On-site) 

Company: JerkTrend – Pune's Premium Digital Acquisition Partner

Duration: 6 Months (With a clear pathway to a full-time offer based on performance)




The Role: Traditional SEO is making way for Answer Engine Optimization (AEO). If an AI can’t find a brand, that brand doesn't exist.

JerkTrend is scaling rapidly, and we are looking for a hungry, AI-savvy intern to work directly with the Founder on executing our proprietary AEO strategies and driving B2B growth on LinkedIn. You won't be fetching coffee or scheduling generic social media posts. You will be building full-funnel digital acquisition systems for premium brands.




What You Will Do:

AEO Deployment: Execute the exact frameworks that train AI models (like Gemini and ChatGPT) to recommend JerkTrend and our clients. This includes overhauling Facebook pages, updating Google My Business entities, and deploying structured Zero-Click content.
B2B LinkedIn Development: Take ownership of outbound LinkedIn growth. You will identify, connect with, and engage high-budget founders and marketing directors using personalized, conversational outreach strategies.
Personal Brand Management: Assist in distributing thought-leadership content across the Founder’s personal LinkedIn profile to build undeniable E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness) signals in the market.
Knowledge Graph Building: Ensure our brand’s digital footprint is semantically clear, technically sound, and overwhelmingly positive across all directories and platforms.




Who You Are:

You live in or around Pune and understand the local and premium B2B market.
You are fascinated by Generative AI and understand how tools like ChatGPT and Google Gemini are changing search behaviors.
You have impeccable written English and understand how to write conversational, corporate storytelling copy.
You are fearless when it comes to B2B outreach and starting conversations with industry leaders.
You want to be mentored by an agency founder with over 7 years of high-level digital and event marketing experience.




What We Offer:

Direct, 1-on-1 mentorship from a Google-certified Generative AI expert.
Hands-on experience with high-ROI, premium client acquisition strategies.
A performance-driven environment where your ideas will be immediately tested in the real world.
A stipend + performance incentives, with a direct pipeline to a full-time role for the right candidate.




How to Apply: 

One idea on how you would generate a B2B lead for a digital marketing agency using LinkedIn with your updated CV




#Hiring #PuneJobs #DigitalMarketingIntern #AEO #MarketingCareers #B2BSales #JerkTrend #Pune

title: Digital Marketing Intern
description:
Job Description:

Title: Digital Marketing Intern

Location: Hinjewadi Phase 2 Pune

Duration: 6 months

Work from office

Stipend: 5k per month

Immediate Joiner




Company Description

Rasta.AI is revolutionizing road infrastructure monitoring and maintenance using AI, computer vision, and 360-degree imaging to provide real-time insights into road conditions. The platform aims to create safer, smarter, and more sustainable roads through accurate defect detection, predictive maintenance, and efficient resource allocation. Rasta.AI fosters collaboration among government agencies, private enterprises, and citizens to enhance road safety and infrastructure management, offering tools like mobile apps, interactive dashboards, and audit reports.




Role Description

This is a full-time on-site role for a Digital Marketing Intern located in Pune at Rasta.AI. The Digital Marketing Intern will be responsible for social media marketing, digital marketing, web analytics, online marketing, and communication tasks to support the company's mission of improving road infrastructure management.




Roles and Responsibility:

Assist in drafting and scheduling engaging content for social media platforms (LinkedIn, Instagram, Twitter, Facebook).
Create and schedule engaging content including posts, graphics, reels, and short videos related to AI, smart mobility, road safety, and technology innovation. 
Help write blogs, newsletters, email campaigns, and other marketing materials
Work with the product and marketing team to promote Rasta.AI features, updates, case studies, and government collaborations. 
Conduct basic keyword research and implement on-page SEO techniques.
Assist in updating website content to enhance search engine rankings.
Coordinate with internal teams for design, content, and delivery of campaigns.
Stay updated on digital marketing trends and best practices.
Attend marketing team meetings and brainstorming sessions.




Required Skills:

Strong presentation and public speaking skills
Excellent verbal communication and stakeholder handling ability
Ability to prepare professional presentations and documentation
Willingness and comfort for travel and field work
Strong understanding of LinkedIn marketing and B2B social media strategy.
Knowledge of tools such as Hootsuite, Buffer, Meta Business Suite, Canva, Adobe Illustrator, or similar platforms.
Basic understanding of AI, technology, or the startup ecosystem is preferred.
Strong communication, storytelling, and content creation skills.




Qualifications

Pursuing or recently completed a degree in Marketing, Media and Communications, or related field
Familiarity with social media platforms and basic digital tools (Google Analytics, Canva, Buffer, etc.)
Social Media Marketing and Digital Marketing skills
Web Analytics and Online Marketing skills
Strong communication skills
Experience with digital marketing tools and platforms
Ability to analyze data and generate insights
Knowledge of SEO and SEM techniques
Interest in road infrastructure and sustainability
Enrollment in or completion of relevant marketing courses or programs




How to Apply: Send your resume and a brief cover letter explaining why you're interested in this internship to hr@aiunika.com.

title: Business Analyst Intern
description:
Business Analyst Intern (Remote) – Skillzenloop




Location: Remote

Type: Full-Time Internship

Stipend: ₹17,000/month

Duration: 1–3 Months




Skillzenloop is hiring a Business Analyst Intern to work on real-world business problems and support data-driven decision-making. This role is ideal for students and freshers who want hands-on experience in analyzing business processes, gathering requirements, and delivering actionable insights.




Key Responsibilities

• Analyze business processes and identify areas for improvement

• Gather, document, and validate business requirements

• Work with datasets to generate insights and support decision-making

• Create reports, dashboards, and presentations for stakeholders

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including technical and management teams

• Assist in developing business strategies and process improvements

• Conduct market research and competitor analysis

• Maintain proper documentation of requirements, workflows, and findings




Required Skills

• Basic understanding of business analysis concepts

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets

• Familiarity with data visualization tools like Power BI or Tableau is a plus

• Basic knowledge of SQL or data handling is an advantage

• Good communication and stakeholder management skills

• Attention to detail and ability to interpret data

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment




Eligibility Criteria

• Students or recent graduates from any discipline (Business, Management, IT, or related fields preferred)

• Freshers are encouraged to apply

• Candidates with relevant projects, case studies, or certifications will have an advantage

• Must be available for a full-time remote internship




Perks and Benefits

• Monthly stipend of ₹17,000

• Hands-on experience with real-world business scenarios

• Internship completion certificate

• Opportunity to build a strong business analysis portfolio

• Exposure to industry-relevant tools and workflows

• Learning-focused and growth-oriented environment




This internship is a strong opportunity for individuals looking to start their career in business analysis and gain practical experience in solving real-world business challenges.

title: Legal Intern
description:
Relevant Experience: Fresher

Key Responsibilities

Privacy & Data Protection:


Assist in ensuring compliance with global privacy regulations, including GDPR, CCPA, and other data protection laws.
Support the drafting and review of privacy policies, data processing agreements, and internal data protection procedures.
Conduct research and internal audit on privacy-related legal developments and best practices in the SaaS industry.


Contract Management

A recent law graduate
Strong interest in technology, SaaS, and privacy laws.
Familiarity with GDPR, CCPA, and other data protection regulations is a plus.

title: Marketing Intern
description:
About Us

The Dessert Symphony is a new-age dessert brand built around a simple idea. Desserts are not just food, they are moments of happiness.

We exist to make people pause, celebrate small wins, share something with others, or just have a better day. Whether it’s a late-night craving, a celebration, or a random treat, we want to be a part of those moments.

At the same time, we’re building a brand for today’s generation. One that people discover through content, connect with, and come back to. Not just because the desserts are great, but because the brand feels relatable.

We are early, which means things move fast and every person here has real impact. If you join, you’re not just helping market a product. You’re helping shape how people experience and remember us.


Your Mission

Drive organic orders from Instagram, website, marketplaces, or any channel you unlock
Increase brand awareness in a way people actually remember
Build brand value, not just visibility but real desirability


What You'll Do

1. Social and Content

Create content that people want to watch, save, and share
Own the brand’s presence on Instagram and beyond
Experiment across platforms if you think something will drive orders

2. Performance Marketing

Run and optimize Meta Ads
Work on food aggregator ads such as Zomato and Swiggy
Focus on outcomes like orders, CAC, and ROI

3. Influencer Marketing

Find creators who actually convert, not just look good on paper
Run collaborations end to end
Build repeatable playbooks for influencer led growth




How This Role Works

You own outcomes, not tasks
No micromanagement, you decide what to test, build, and scale
Good ideas win, not titles or seniority
If you can prove something drives orders, you get more budget and freedom


Who You Are

You understand how attention works on the internet
You think in ideas and distribution, not just posting content
You are biased towards action, you test fast and learn faster
You care about results, orders over vanity metrics
Bonus if you have built something, grown a page, or driven real engagement before


Perks

Competitive salary
Free desserts (just enough to keep your ideas sweet)
Real ownership from day one
Freedom to execute your ideas without waiting for approvals
Direct impact on building a brand people care about
If things work out well for both of us, this can convert into a full time role
Show more

title: Intern - Animation 2D
description:
Scopely is looking for a creative and enthusiastic Animation generalist - Intern to join our Casino team in Bangalore on a hybrid basis.

At Scopely, we care deeply about what we do and want to inspire play, every day - whether in our work environments alongside our talented colleagues, or through our deep connections with our communities of players. We are a global team of game lovers who are developing, publishing and innovating the mobile games industry, connecting millions of people around the world daily.

The GSN Casino team is home to slots, bingo, cards, and more! Work on incredible games, including a top-10 grossing app, alongside the best in the business.

What You’ll Be Doing


Animate 2D UI/Character moments for in-game features, events, and promo popups
Design cool 2D assets — characters, props, icons, backgrounds
Turn static art into lively, expressive animations
Help polish UI transitions and micro-interactions
Prep clean, organised, animation-ready files
Jump in on seasonal reskins and live game updates
Collaborate with Art, Design & Tech teams to ship awesome stuff
Iterate fast, learn faster


What We’re Looking For


Strong understanding of animation principles (timing, spacing, squash & stretch, anticipation, etc.)
Solid fundamentals in drawing, composition, color & lighting
Someone who enjoys both creating assets and animating them
Basic understanding of UI/character animation
Open to feedback and excited to improve
A team player who thrives in a structured production environment


Tools & Technical Skills


Proficiency in: Spine / Adobe animate (or similar animation tools)
Photoshop (for asset creation)
Basic understanding of asset optimization for games
Familiarity with AI-assisted art/animation tools is a plus


Join us to be part of the innovative world of AI-driven creativity and make contributions to popular games enjoyed by a global audience!

About Scopely

Scopely is a leading video game and global interactive entertainment company, home to many of the world’s most beloved and enduring experiences, including two of the most successful mobile games of all-time “MONOPOLY GO!” and “Pokémon GO,” along with “Stumble Guys,” “Star Trek™ Fleet Command,” “MARVEL Strike Force,” “WWE Champions,” the Scrabble® franchise, “Yahtzee® With Buddies,” and many others. Across mobile, web, PC, and console, Scopely creates, develops, publishes, and live-operates one of the most diversified and award-winning portfolios in the games industry — bringing hundreds of millions of players together through a shared love of play.

Founded in 2011, Scopely is powered by its exceptional team — including thousands of world-class gamemakers around the globe, a distinctive tenet-driven culture, and its proprietary technology platform, Playgami. Together, these strengths have fueled Scopely’s position as the #1 mobile games company in the U.S. and #2 globally, generating more than $10 billion in lifetime revenue. Whether building global sensations like “MONOPOLY GO!” from the ground up, or expanding through strategic acquisitions, including the FoxNext, GSN, and Niantic games businesses — Scopely consistently delivers experiences players love today and return to for years to come.

Recognized multiple times as one of the "100 Most Influential Companies in the World" by TIME magazine and one of Fast Company's "World's Most Innovative Companies" and “Best Workplaces for Innovators,” Scopely believes that video games can be a force for good — creating meaningful connections, vibrant communities, and making life better through play.

Scopely has global operations and partners across four continents in more than a dozen countries worldwide. For more information, visit: https://www.scopely.com/.

Notice to Candidates: Scopely will never request payment or financial information during the application or hiring process. Please apply only through our official website and verify that all Talent Partner communications come from an email address ending in @scopely.com.

Should you have any questions or encounter any fraudulent requests/emails/websites, please immediately contact recruiting@scopely.com. Our job applicant privacy policies are available here: California Privacy Notice and EEA/UK Privacy Notice.

Employment at Scopely is based solely on a person's merit and qualifications. Scopely does not discriminate against any employee or applicant because of race, creed, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity/expression, national origin, disability, age, genetic information, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy or related condition (including breastfeeding), or any other basis protected by law. We also consider qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records, consistent with applicable federal, state and local law.

title: AI Intern
description:
Role: AI Enablement Intern




About Joveo




As the global leader in AI-powered, high-performance recruitment marketing, Joveo is transforming talent attraction and recruitment media buying for the world’s largest employers, staffing firms, RPOs, and media agencies. The Joveo platform enables businesses to attract, source, engage, and hire the best candidates on time and within budget.




Backed by marquee investors like Nexus Ventures Partners, Joveo has been featured in Inc. Magazine’s List of America’s Fastest-Growing Private Companies for three years in a row.




Powering millions of jobs every day, Joveo’s data-driven recruitment marketing platform uses advanced data science and machine learning to dynamically manage and optimize talent sourcing and applications across all online channels while providing real-time insights at every step of the job seeker journey, from click to hire.




For more information about Joveo’s award-winning platform, visit www.joveo.com




About the role




We’re looking for an AI Intern to help design and implement practical AI workflows that automate business processes and improve analytics. You’ll evaluate AI tools, build prototypes, connect APIs, and create dashboards that deliver measurable impact across teams. This is a hands-on role for a curious problem solver who enjoys experimenting, documenting, and shipping working automations.




What you’ll do

Map manual processes and design AI-enabled workflows to reduce time, cost, and errors.
Evaluate and compare AI tools and platforms (e.g., OpenAI/Azure OpenAI, Google Vertex AI, LangChain, Zapier/Make, RPA tools).
Build lightweight prototypes: data pipelines, API integrations, webhooks, and automation scripts (primarily in Python).
Develop analytics dashboards and reports (e.g., Power BI/Tableau/Looker) to track outcomes of automations.
Implement LLM use cases (prompting, basic RAG, embeddings) with attention to data quality and security guidelines.
Document experiments, build how-to guides, and share results with non-technical stakeholders.
Monitor performance, run A/B tests, and iterate to improve accuracy, latency, and cost.
Collaborate with business teams (Ops, Marketing, HR, Finance) to translate needs into solutions.




What you’ll learn

End-to-end automation: from discovery to production and measurement.
Practical LLM integration patterns, prompt engineering, and evaluation.
Best practices for data governance, privacy, and model/tool selection.
Experiment design, rapid prototyping, and ROI measurement.




Minimum qualifications

Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent experience).
Comfortable with Python and basic SQL; familiarity with APIs and JSON.
Understanding of ML/AI fundamentals (classification vs. generation, evaluation, basic statistics).
Strong problem-solving, documentation, and communication skills.
Ability to work 20–40 hours/week for 10–12 weeks (flexible).




Nice to have

Experience with Zapier/Make or RPA (UiPath/Automation Anywhere/Power Automate).
Familiarity with LLM frameworks (LangChain/LlamaIndex), vector databases (FAISS/Pinecone/Chroma).
Cloud basics (AWS/GCP/Azure), Docker, Git.
Analytics tools (Tableau/Power BI/Looker/Metabase) and data wrangling (Pandas).
Frontend for prototypes (Streamlit/Gradio) is a plus.
Show more

title: Industrial Trainee Finance
description:
Job Description

Company: Wabtec Corporation (A US Listed MNC)

About Us

With more than 27,000 employees in over 50 countries around the world, Wabtec provides innovative solutions to our freight rail, passenger transit and industrial customers. Today, Wabtec is a leading supplier of freight car and locomotive products. We are a global leader in rail friction, HVAC and pantographs. Our customers depend on us for the development and production of electronic recording, measuring and communications systems. Our focus on advanced engineering and new product development has resulted in more than 4,000 active patents.

Position Title: Industrial Trainee CA/CMA

Department: Finance – Multiple Verticals

Location: Gurgaon , Marhowara, Pune, Rohtak, Hosur, Bangalore

Duration: As per ICAI (9-12 Months) or ICMAI (15 months)

Role Overview

The Industrial Trainee will support various verticals within the Finance organization including Controllership, FP&A, Tax, Treasury, Plant Finance, Commercial Finance, Internal Audit etc. The role offers strong exposure to real-time financial operations, global processes, and cross-functional collaboration.

Key Responsibilities

Responsibilities will vary based on allocation to specific finance verticals and may include

Controllership, FP&A, Plant Finance


Support month-end and quarter-end closing processes, balance sheet reconciliations, and group reporting submissions.
Support statutory, tax, SOX, and internal audits through data compilation and coordination with multiple stakeholders.
Prepare MIS dashboards and conduct variance, trend, and financial performance analyses.
Assist in budgeting, forecasting, financial modelling
Support costing activities, inventory control & audits, capex monitoring, Cost optimisation and preparation of plant-level MIS.
Assist with standard cost calculations, BOM and routing validations, and standard vs. actual variance analysis (material, labour, overheads).
Contribute to process improvement initiatives and support system enhancement projects


Direct Tax & Transfer Pricing


Assist in advance tax computations and tax provision preparation.
Assist in preparation of annual income-tax computations and review tax returns (Indian and foreign).
Coordinate and support direct-tax audits, transfer-pricing audits, and internal/statutory audits.
Assist in review of transfer-pricing studies and support in collation of audit evidence.
Assist in preparation of submissions for assessments being managed in-house.
Assist in providing day-to-day advisory on corporate and international direct-tax matters.
Support the TDS compliance team with technical query resolution.
Assist in assessing tax implications for new business transactions and deals.


Qualifications & Experience


CMA /CAIntermediate – Both Groups Cleared in First Attempt
CMA/CA Rank Holder (AIR in Intermediate Exam)
In case of CA, Completed first-year articleship from a Top 10 CA Firm (Big 4 or other leading firms)


Key Competencies


Strong financial and business acumen with the ability to interpret numbers in a strategic context.
Proficiency in advanced Excel skills (financial modelling, forecasting, scenario analysis) and PowerPoint (structured storytelling).
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
High ownership mindset with the ability to handle multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment
Demonstrated integrity and adherence to ethical standards
Experience working on Oracle or SAP is an advantage


Additional Information

What could you accomplish in a place that puts People First?

At Wabtec, it’s not just about a job - it’s about the impact you make. When our people come together, we’re Expanding the Possible by continuously improving what we do and how we do it - for our clients and each other.

If you’re ready to revolutionize how the world moves for future generations, Wabtec is the place for you.

Who are we?

Wabtec is a leading global provider of equipment, systems, digital solutions, and value-added services for the freight and transit rail sectors. Drawing on more than 150 years of experience, we are leading the way in safety, efficiency, reliability, innovation, and productivity. Whether it’s freight, transit, ports, logistics, mining, industrial, or marine, our expertise, technologies, and people together – are accelerating the future of transportation. With roots that date back to George Westinghouse, Thomas Edison, and Louis Faiveley, Wabtec has always built technologies and implemented solutions for a variety of sectors that are critical to meeting the needs of customers and governments alike.

Our global team of about 30,000 employees worldwide delivers performance that moves the world forward. We’re lifelong learners, obsessed with better. Learn more at www.WabtecCorp.com.

Culture powers us and the possibilities.

We believe the best ideas come from a mix of experiences and backgrounds. At Wabtec, we strive every day to create a place where everyone belongs. We’re building a culture where leadership, inclusion and your unique perspective fuel progress.

We’re proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. We welcome talent of all backgrounds, experiences, and identities, including race, gender, age, disability, veteran status and more.

Need accommodation? Just let us know - we’ve got you.
Show more

title: Trainee- BD & Exports
description:
Key Responsibilities:

Preparation of pre-shipment documents like invoice, packing list, SDF,
Export declaration and export incentive declaration etc for custom filling purpose
Coordination with Service Provider for shipping documents (shipping bill) and custom clearance
Preparation of post-shipment documents like Bill Exchange, Bill of Lading , Invoice, Packing List, SDF, Shipping Bill, Insurance Certificate, Fumigation/Heat Treated Certificate and Certificate of origin (if applicable) etc.
MIS Reporting
Coordinate with PPC and packing for the shipment readiness status
Coordinate with multiple service provider for freight rate negotiation
Coordinate with with Service Provider for container planning with respect to vessel cut off date and transit time to make the delivery as per customer requirement.
Coordinate with Service Provider for post shipment documents and freight bills
Submission of Export documents in bank and customer on time.
To ensure timely close the outstanding export bills from bank record once payment received from overseas buyer.
To share and co-ordinate the post shipment documents dispatch detail with overseas buyer.




Qualification/ Experience

BBA, B.Tech., BE, MBA

Experience:- 1-2 years

title: Sales And Marketing Intern
description:
We’re hiring: Sales & Marketing Intern (On-site, Lucknow)




BISKITS is a premium cookie business based in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh. We specialise in crafting small-batch cookies made from clean ingredients and free of preservatives. Our focus is on creating a delightful experience for our customers through high-quality, handcrafted cookies baked in small batches.




Role Description

This is a full-time, on-site role located in Lucknow. The Sales and Marketing intern will assist in developing and implementing sales strategies, social media campaigns, customer engagement, and pop-up events. Day-to-day tasks include supporting sales activities, generating digital content for the brand, conducting market research, and managing client relationships to drive business growth.




Responsibilities

Digital Marketing and Analytics - track performance metrics, manage website updates, and conduct competitor research to inform marketing strategy.
Sales & Customer Development - generate leads, engage customers across channels, and support sales efforts, including outreach and CRM updates.
Social Media Management - manage social media, create visual and photo/video content, and drive engagement through active community interaction.
Brand Promotion and Campaigns - drive brand growth through influencer outreach, campaign execution, and on-brand customer communication.
Event and Offline Marketing - support planning special in-store events, pop-ups, or community events, promotions, and distribution of offline marketing materials.




What we're looking for

Currently pursuing/recently completed a degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field
Strong understanding of Instagram and social media content trends and original ideas
Proficient in Canva and basic design/editing tools (Photoshop/Illustrator)
Familiar with Shopify for website/product updates
Basic experience with Zoho CRM (or similar CRM tools)
Understanding of key metrics (reach, engagement, conversions)
Strong written communication (captions, emails, basic copy)
Good interpersonal skills for customer engagement and relationship building
Proactive, detail-oriented, and able to multitask
Comfortable with on-ground work (events, pop-ups, activations)

title: Business Development Trainee
description:
Join WWF-India as a Fundraiser and be our Conservation Ambassador at Airports!

Do you love talking to people and want your words to make a real difference? WWF-India is looking for passionate, confident, and outgoing individuals to engage with travelers at airports and inspire them to support our mission to save the nature and biodiversity of our country.

As the face of WWF-India, you will:


Interact with travelers at the airport and share stories of our conservation work across India.
Encourage and inspire them to contribute towards protecting wildlife and nature.
Be a proud representative of one of the world’s most respected conservation organizations.



Benefits

Work in 6-hour flexible shifts inside airports with full amenities.

â Opportunity to work with the WWF-India, gain knowledge on conservation issues, and develop life skills and confidence.

â Attractive salary plus performance-based incentives .

Job Location – Hyderabad Airport

If you’re energetic, people-oriented, and driven by a cause, this is your chance to turn Conversations into Conservation !

Apply now and be the change nature needs!
